title: フェブラリーSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I won't second-guess myself anymore. There are
people out there who only I can make happy!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
They're waiting for me to put a smile on their face
with the power of feng shui, and I won't let them
down!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Let's do everything we can to boost our
luck before the big race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our feelings in sync, we decide to visit all
the places we can think of.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Whew! The hot water felt great! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've washed away our impurities in a
bathhouse south of Tracen... ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Next stop is the honeyade store! ♪ Today's lucky
color is lavender! So...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Let's grab a nutritious lavender yogurt honeyade,
for nourishment and good luck!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We knock back our gigantic drinks. Then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time, Tarumae. You said this is your
first February Stakes, right?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It's one of the biggest races that all dirt
racers strive to win.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
But I'll be the one seizing victory, because I'm the
Tomakomai City Tourism Ambassador!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I swore on the sash they gave me when I left that I
would return home a champion!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: But... hm? Where's Rickey?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Sorry for making you wait, Tarumae. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna give my all today, so do me the same
favor, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: R-Rickey? You, um...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: You're... a lot more upbeat than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep, 'cause I learned my lesson. Hesitation in the
heart leads to hesitation when running.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I have someone who believes in me! Someone I
trust with all my heart! And you know what she
told me?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
She told me that all I have to do is believe in
myself and keep moving straight ahead.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Together, all the people who've helped me out or
taught me things make up one big environment
around me. That's the meaning of feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Right now, I'm surrounded by their warm,
reassuring kindness. That's why...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm okay now! I'll prove my way of doing things
with my own running!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Because if I had been putting all my effort toward
the wrong path, there's no way I'd be going
head-to-head with you right now, Tarumae.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Rickey...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're right. In the end, all we can do is
prove ourselves with our running.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Bring it on, then! I'll show you just how much I
love my hometown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae is at the top of her game, and
Wonder Acute is a seasoned veteran. This will be
Copano Rickey's toughest opponent lineup yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she's finally gained the unshakeable
confidence she needed. And so, the first—and
most crucial—challenge of her senior year begins.
